segment.source: Renders an intro above feature cards arranged full-width, in two columns, or stacked; each card pairs a small icon (check by default) with a title and rich-text description. Use it for: feature or service rundowns where every point needs a sentence or two of explanation rather than a single line. Prefer 'Feature Checklist' for terse included-item ticks inside one card; '3-Column Feature Grid' for an icon-topped grid presentation.
